name: German Sour Cherry Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Melt the butter and chocolate together.
3. Beat the egg yolks and sugar until light; add the butter-chocolate mixture, and continue mixing.
4. Add the vanilla, then stir in the flour and salt.
5. Fold in the beaten egg whites.
6. Pour the mixture into a buttered 10-inch springform pan and sprinkle the drained cherries on top.
7. Bake at 350°F for 55 minutes.
